_note: Slice-local proof register: the slice's own gate theorems (proofs/GateProofs.lean), kernel-checked and shipped here. Not a larger canonical register — only what the examples cite.

entries.key_results: The grounding gate accepts only GROUNDED + executed + exit-0 + hash-match (sound), and is non-vacuous (discriminates). Kernel axioms: [propext]; non-vacuity: none.
